title: Hypergraphic Pulp
description: Ce style fusionne l'illustration des couvertures de comics des années 90 avec une peinture numérique hyper-réaliste et cinématographique. Il se caractérise par un éclairage en clair-obscur saisissant, des ombres noires profondes et des textures brillantes qui se détachent agressivement sur un fond parfaitement plat, sans texture et très saturé. L'éclairage dramatique en contre-plongée et les contours nets comme des lames de rasoir créent une intensité graphique viscérale rappelant les affiches de grindhouse et le pop-art pulp.
description_en: This style merges high-octane 1990s comic book cover illustration with cinematic, hyper-rendered digital painting. It is defined by stark chiaroscuro lighting, deep crushed black shadows, and glossy subject textures that pop aggressively against a perfectly flat, untextured, highly saturated background. The dramatic low-angle lighting and razor-sharp edge cutouts create a visceral, graphic intensity reminiscent of grindhouse posters and pulp pop-art.
description_fr: Ce style fusionne l'illustration des couvertures de comics des années 90 avec une peinture numérique hyper-réaliste et cinématographique. Il se caractérise par un éclairage en clair-obscur saisissant, des ombres noires profondes et des textures brillantes qui se détachent agressivement sur un fond parfaitement plat, sans texture et très saturé. L'éclairage dramatique en contre-plongée et les contours nets comme des lames de rasoir créent une intensité graphique viscérale rappelant les affiches de grindhouse et le pop-art pulp.
prompt: Digital illustration combining 1990s pulp comic book cover art with hyper-rendered, airbrushed digital painting. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The visual execution relies on extreme, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, typically utilizing a harsh low-angle key light or stark side illumination to create visceral intensity. Forms are sculpted by deep, crushed absolute black core shadows that act as negative space contouring. Surfaces exhibit intense, glossy specular highlights, giving materials a polished, hyper-tactile quality. Render the scene using {{primary_color}} for the dominant subject tones, accented by striking {{accent_color}} details and {{secondary_color}} midtones. The environment behind the subject must be reduced to a perfectly flat, untextured, solid field of pure color, creating a stark pop-art juxtaposition. Subject edges are treated as razor-sharp silhouette cutouts with zero background gradient. Subjects feature smooth, volumetric rendering with subtle cinematic grain in the mid-tones, contrasting completely with the sterile matte void of the background. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners. Provide a kinetic, aggressive aesthetic reminiscent of graphic novels., hyper-rendered digital painting, 1990s comic cover, grindhouse pulp, extreme chiaroscuro, deep crushed blacks, harsh dramatic lighting, glossy specular highlights, flat untextured background, razor-sharp silhouette, high-contrast pop-art, kinetic energy, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame

background_prompt: A stark, high-contrast graphic environment devoid of any central subject. The scene features massive, imposing architectural or abstract geometric forms rendered with extreme chiaroscuro lighting. Deep, crushed absolute black shadows define the negative space, while harsh, glossy specular highlights catch the edges of the structures. The environment is illuminated by an intense, dramatic light source, casting long, stark shadows. Rendered primarily in {{primary_color}} and {{secondary_color}}, with sharp {{accent_color}} rim lights separating the monolithic forms against a perfectly flat, untextured void. The atmosphere is heavy, kinetic, and aggressive, reminiscent of 1990s pulp comic book settings, utilizing razor-sharp edges and smooth, airbrushed gradients within the illuminated zones.
background_prompt_removebg: A stark, high-contrast graphic environment devoid of any central subject. The scene features massive, imposing architectural or abstract geometric forms rendered with extreme chiaroscuro lighting. Deep, crushed absolute black shadows define the negative space, while harsh, glossy specular highlights catch the edges of the structures. The environment is illuminated by an intense, dramatic light source, casting long, stark shadows. Rendered primarily in {{primary_color}} and {{secondary_color}}, with sharp {{accent_color}} rim lights separating the monolithic forms against a perfectly flat, untextured void. The atmosphere is heavy, kinetic, and aggressive, reminiscent of 1990s pulp comic book settings, utilizing razor-sharp edges and smooth, airbrushed gradients within the illuminated zones. In the foreground, a highly stylized, aggressive graphic overlay acts as a framing device—resembling jagged ink splatters, distressed halftone patterns, or sharp geometric hazard borders—rendered in solid black and {{accent_color}}. This foreground frame and the distant architectural forms are rendered against a flat {{background_color}} backdrop. The entire composition is composited on this clean {{background_color}} surface, with the razor-sharp edges of the environmental structures and the foreground framing elements interacting starkly with the {{background_color}} negative space.
